channel.title: Projects on Shehao Li
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Shehao Li

item.title: CalendarDIFF | AI Agent Workflow System for Gmail + ICS
item.description: AI agent workflow system and schedule-change governance platform for Gmail + ICS, built around structured proposals, human approval, an explicit runtime, MCP interfaces, and annual replay validation.

item.title: Author Copilot Narrative Editing and Evaluation Platform
item.description: Live interactive narrative product built around an Author Copilot editing loop, a stateful Play runtime, and end-to-end author -> publish -> play evaluation.

item.title: Auto Load-Off Test
item.description: Python automation tool for AWG + oscilloscope validation flows with validation, logging, retry/timeout handling, and CSV/MAT export.

item.title: DingTalk To-Do Creator from Email
item.description: Email-to-task automation pipeline that extracts structured workflow data from IMAP mailboxes, creates DingTalk To-Dos, and preserves idempotent processing state.

item.title: GitHub Issues to DingTalk
item.description: Webhook-based GitHub issue digest service that aggregates issue events, performs incremental sync, and pushes summaries into DingTalk for responsible owners.

item.title: Test Automation MultiTimer
item.description: Supplementary Python Tkinter GUI for timed DMM monitoring over VISA/SCPI with interval sampling, logging, and optional MAT export.
